review_text: This apartment is in a fabulous location - walk to SoHo- and right on transport.  Place was spotlessly clean! Brendan was very easy to deal with and quite flexible as we got in quite late at night.  Would recommend highly for affordable family accommodation in HK.
decision_tags: great location, spotlessly clean, flexible host, near transport, family friendly
location_comment: Fabulous location walkable to SoHo and right on transport
facility_comment: Place was spotlessly clean and good for affordable family accommodation
host_comment: Brendan was very easy to deal with and flexible with late check-in

review_text:
The apartment is very clean and has everything. Even the place is very small - it's the standard in HK- but well organized. The internet connection is stable and fast. The air con and water heater work properly. The kitchen is well-equipped and there is a washing machine too. The area is safe and super convenient with Airport Express, MTR, trams, ferries and buses. H&M is just right behind the house and Tsui Wah restaurant is great, just around the corner :)

The only problem we had was the stairs as we had to climb up to 3rd floor with our huge luggages. But the place is worth for our stay.

I will stay at Brendan's apartment again for sure!
decision_tags: clean apartment, excellent location, well-equipped kitchen, stairs access, great amenities
location_comment: Safe and super convenient with multiple transport options and nearby shops/restaurants
facility_comment: Well-organized with stable internet, working appliances, and well-equipped kitchen despite small size
host_comment: Guest would definitely stay again at Brendan's apartment

review_text: Pretty good little apartment. Just a really great location. apt fit our needs just right. We had comfortable beds, ac in all the rooms. no frills, just right. Will stay again when back in HK.
decision_tags: great location, comfortable beds, AC in all rooms, no frills, good value
facility_comment: Comfortable beds and AC in all rooms, apartment fit needs just right
host_comment: No specific mention of host interaction

review_text: We had a great experience staying in this apartment in Hong Kong. Although very small, it was very clean and in a most convenient location in Central. Very quiet, good wifi and television. Brendan also was more flexible than most hosts usually are. We needed to leave some luggage under a bed during a 4 day excursion into China, and needed to adjust our second stay in the apartment by one day due to China visa complications. Luckily no one else was staying in the apartment while we were in China, but Brendan was most kind to allow us to make the required adjustments. I would definitely recommend the apartment and host to anyone (provided they can climb a few flights of stairs as there is no elevator.) I liked the apartment experience much more than staying at an expensive hotel! The Vietnamese restaurant right next to the entrance was a great family operated place with good, inexpensive food - wonderful after a 15 hour flight!
decision_tags: convenient location, clean apartment, flexible host, no elevator, quiet environment
location_comment: Most convenient location in Central with a great Vietnamese restaurant next door
facility_comment: Very clean, quiet, with good wifi and television, though very small and no elevator
host_comment: Very flexible and kind, allowing luggage storage and schedule adjustments

review_text: The apartment was exactly the same as the photos posted. It was very clean and cosy and the wifi connection was awesome! Though the place was slightly small, but it has eveything we need. Would definitely rent the apartment again!
